name: Spinach Saute
recipeIngredient: 1 large Tomato, peeled and cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash spinach thoroughly and drain.
2. Sauté tomato and garlic in a large skillet using salad oil.
3. Add spinach; cover and cook over low heat for 15 minutes, stirring once or twice.
4. Add salt and pepper to taste.
5. Cook, uncovered, for an additional 5 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
